tweets.author: tradingstrategies.work
tweets.text:
BOTTOM LINE — SAME OPTICS, DIFFERENT MACHINE

2022 was a margin-call story. Today is a financing-and-dilution story

One can force your hand overnight. The other squeezes slowly and leaves you discretion. Knowing which one you face is the entire edge

Run your own numbers

#Bitco

tweets.author: tradingstrategies.work
tweets.text:
WHAT THAT MEANS — NO PRICE TRIGGERS A LIQUIDATION

Since then, every coin is unpledged. There is no bitcoin price at which a lender can force a sale

When BTC recently slipped below the ~76k cost basis, the position went underwater on paper with zero balance-sheet stress

tweets.author: tradingstrategies.work
tweets.text:
THE 2022 SETUP — A REAL TRIGGER

At the bottom, ~130k BTC at ~15.5k was worth ~2.0B against ~2.4B of debt

The dangerous piece was a 205M Silvergate loan, secured by bitcoin, with a margin call if price broke near 21k. A price-triggered gun to the head

tweets.author: tradingstrategies.work
tweets.text:
STRATEGY'S DEBT — WHY 2022 AND TODAY ARE NOT THE SAME RISK

In November 2022, MicroStrategy briefly owed more than its bitcoin was worth. Today looks similar on the surface — the risk underneath is not. Here is what changed

#Bitcoin #MSTR
